i need to check how long it took for a udp packet to be sent to a server in one direction. i will use a timer to measure the time between sending the packet and receiving a response. the timer will start when the packet is sent and stop when the response is received. i will calculate the difference between the two times to get the duration. i will use a simple console application to send the packet and receive the response. the application will print the time taken in milliseconds. i will ensure that the code is efficient and does not use any unnecessary resources. i will test the application to make sure it works correctly. i will also check that the code is free of any errors and that it meets all the requirements.
